Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}All right, the coffee's brewed. And the beans are Kilimanjaro, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Mmm, that aroma is unbelievable. To think we trekked almost six kilometers for this one cup of coffee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It truly is a magnificent sight, my friend. This view, being here with you... I'll cherish this memory for as long as I live.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So much beautiful scenery in the movie...[n]I feel like I've sharpened my aesthetic sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Wow, that was a spectacle for the ages! I'm so glad we came![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Hiraga[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
